title: Kraenzlinella lappago
taxonomy: Kraenzlinella lappago is a species of orchid, and as such, it belongs to the kingdom Plantae. It is classified under the family Orchidaceae and the subfamily Orchidoideae. Further classification places it under the tribe Cranichideae and the genus Kraenzlinella.
